# Thylakoid function in prokaryotes

## Short Teaching Summary
Thylakoid function in prokaryotes: In photosynthetic prokaryotes, thylakoids appear as infoldings of the plasma membrane where chlorophyll attaches to serve as the site of photosynthesis. Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
